name: Carrot Pineapple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the juice.
2. Add enough skim milk to the reserved juice to make 3/4 cup of liquid, then set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: whole wheat flour, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, granulated sugar, cinnamon, grated carrots, vegetable oil, egg, and vanilla.
4. Stir until the carrots are well coated and no flour streaks remain.
5. Pour the milk mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just moistened.
6. Spoon batter evenly into muffin tins coated with non-stick spray, filling each cup 2/3 full.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 20 to 25 minutes or until done.
8. Serve warm.
